controlled_motion_instruction: Continuous figure-eight motion at a comfortable steady pace without lifting the mouse.

controlled_variables.selected_device_policy: operator moves only SIGNO; select most active native raw device

freshness_rule: All run IDs, trace IDs, and repetition artifacts must be new and must not occur in the pilot contract.
approval_basis: Candidate timing contract frozen from five independent Pilot v3 runs before confirmation capture.
